title: Nephrodium vieillardii
taxonomy: Nephrodium vieillardii is classified within the family Dryopteridaceae, which is a group of ferns commonly known as the wood ferns or scaly male ferns. This plant belongs to the genus Nephrodium, a genus of ferns that was previously recognized but is now considered synonymous with the genus Dryopteris. However, some sources still recognize Nephrodium as a distinct genus. Nephrodium vieillardii is native to New Caledonia, a French territory in the Pacific Ocean. The classification of this plant is still under review in the scientific community.
